nasa_apod.title: The Moon, Venus, and the Pleiades
nasa_apod.explanation: No, Earth did not recently acquire six more moons!  Today’s APOD is a combination of images following the Moon, Venus, and the Pleiades across a southern Sicilian sky as twilight turned to evening on April 19. From 2023 to 2029, the Pleiades' and the Moon “visit" each other once per month due to the...
